publishedAbstract: - `Monitoring ClusterOperator` degraded after upgrading to `RHOCP cluster version 4.15` and showing the following error message: ~~~ $ oc describe co monitoring message: 'UpdatingUserWorkloadThanosRuler: waiting for ThanosRuler object changes failed: waiting for Thanos Ruler openshift-user-workload-monitoring/user-workload: context deadline exceeded' reason: UpdatingUserWorkloadThanosRulerFailed ~~~- Pod `thanos-ruler-user-workload-1` is stuck in `ContainerCreating` state with the error: ~~~ MountVolume.MountDevice failed for volume "pvc-abcd": rpc error: code = Aborted desc = an operation with the given Volume ID 0001-0011-openshift-storage-0000000000000001-xyz already exists ~~~
publishedTitle: Monitoring operator degraded due to thanos-ruler-user-workload pod stuck with the MountVolume.MountDevice failed error in RHOCP 4
